impact: Watchdog timeout (SIGKILL/SIGABRT) on iOS and UI thread freeze due to 200ms while-loop active polling.
iOS native crash (SIGABRT) due to Sharing.shareAsync handling large base64 over the bridge instead of file:// URI.
repro: Open heavy PDF file on iOS device.

impact: OOM crash on WebViews rendering massive PDFs (file is 1589 lines God object holding too much state).
repro: Tap multiple PDF views sequentially without proper cleanup.

impact: Navigation state loss and slow rerenders (2644 lines God object, routing all roles).
Stale closures and memory leaks due to manual in-flight Request Maps tied to React Refs.
repro: Rapidly switch scopes or tabs in Director Reports.

impact: Loss of critical session restore failures in Web/Native initialization.
